changeSet.author: batool
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE patient_encounters ADD CONSTRAINT ck_patient_encounters_follow_up_required CHECK ( (encounter_reason = 'FOLLOW_UP' AND follow_up_encounter_id IS NOT NULL) OR (encounter_reason <> 'FOLLOW_UP' AND follow_up_encounter_id IS NULL) );

ALTER TABLE patient_encounters ADD CONSTRAINT ck_patient_encounters_discharge_fields_required CHECK ( (status = 'DISCHARGED' AND discharge_type IS NOT NULL AND discharge_at IS NOT NULL) OR (status <> 'DISCHARGED') );

ALTER TABLE patient_encounters ADD CONSTRAINT ck_patient_encounters_discharge_fields_only_when_discharged CHECK ( (status = 'DISCHARGED') OR (status <> 'DISCHARGED' AND discharge_type IS NULL AND discharge_at IS NULL) );
